fields.acceptance_criteria: CodeViewer with language detection, line numbering, line highlighting, auto-scroll; FileContentViewer with custom renderer hook extensibility; syntax highlighting via syntect or pulldown-cmark in WASM
fields.title: Port: CodeViewer and FileContentViewer

fields.acceptance_criteria: CodeViewer with language detection, line numbering, line highlighting, auto-scroll; FileContentViewer with extensible renderer prop; syntax highlighting via pulldown-cmark (Markdown) + syntect (code blocks) — pure Rust, no JS fallback; language detection from filename extension mapped to syntect LanguageSet; basic language coverage is acceptable per project decision
fields.title: Port: CodeViewer and FileContentViewer
